articles.title: How to Unlock a Locked User Account
articles.content:
## Overview

Accounts may lock after multiple failed login attempts.

### Steps
1. Wait 15 minutes and try again.
2. Use the self-service password reset tool.
3. Ensure Caps Lock is off.
4. Contact IT if the account remains locked.

### Prevention
- Avoid repeated incorrect password attempts.
- Use a password manager if needed.

articles.title: How to Set Up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
articles.content:
## Overview

MFA adds an extra layer of security to your account.

### Setup Steps
1. Log into the security portal.
2. Navigate to Security Settings.
3. Select 'Enable MFA'.
4. Register your mobile number or authenticator app.
5. Verify with a test code.

### Troubleshooting
- Ensure phone time is set automatically.
- Reinstall authenticator app if codes fail.

articles.title: Wi-Fi Not Connecting on Laptop
articles.content:
## Overview

If your laptop cannot connect to Wi-Fi, follow these steps.

### Troubleshooting
1. Turn Wi-Fi off and on.
2. Restart your router.
3. Forget and reconnect to the network.
4. Run the network troubleshooter.
5. Update network drivers.

### Escalation
- Other devices cannot connect.
- Network adapter not detected.

articles.title: How to Map a Network Drive
articles.content:
## Overview

Mapping a drive allows easy access to shared folders.

### Steps (Windows)
1. Open File Explorer.
2. Click 'This PC' > 'Map Network Drive'.
3. Enter the folder path (e.g., \\server\shared).
4. Select 'Reconnect at sign-in'.
5. Click Finish.

### Troubleshooting
- Ensure VPN is connected.
- Confirm permissions are granted.

articles.title: Software Installation Request Process
articles.content:
## Overview

Employees must request approval before installing new software.

### Steps
1. Submit a ticket via the IT portal.
2. Provide business justification.
3. Await manager approval.
4. IT will install the software remotely.

### Notes
- Unauthorized installations are blocked.
- Only licensed software is permitted.

articles.title: Laptop Battery Draining Quickly
articles.content:
## Overview

If your laptop battery drains rapidly, try the following.

### Steps
1. Lower screen brightness.
2. Close unused applications.
3. Disable Bluetooth if not needed.
4. Check battery health settings.
5. Update operating system.

### Escalation
- Battery health below 60%.
- Device shuts down unexpectedly.

articles.title: Blue Screen Error (Windows) Troubleshooting
articles.content:
## Overview

A Blue Screen error may be caused by driver or hardware issues.

### Steps
1. Restart the computer.
2. Note the error code.
3. Update drivers.
4. Run Windows Memory Diagnostic.
5. Check for Windows updates.

### Escalation
- Repeated crashes.
- Hardware failure suspected.

articles.title: Cannot Access Shared Folder
articles.content:
## Overview

Access issues may be permission-related.

### Steps
1. Confirm VPN connection.
2. Verify correct folder path.
3. Request access from folder owner.
4. Clear cached credentials.

### Escalation
- Permission denied errors persist.

articles.title: How to Configure Email Signature
articles.content:
## Steps (Outlook)
1. Open Outlook.
2. Go to File > Options > Mail.
3. Click 'Signatures'.
4. Create new signature.
5. Save and set as default.

### Best Practices
- Include name, title, company.
- Keep formatting professional.

articles.title: Disk Space Almost Full Warning
articles.content:
## Overview

Low disk space can slow performance.

### Steps
1. Empty Recycle Bin.
2. Run Disk Cleanup.
3. Delete temporary files.
4. Move large files to shared storage.
5. Uninstall unused programs.

### Escalation
- Disk remains above 90% usage.

articles.title: Keyboard or Mouse Not Working
articles.content:
## Troubleshooting
1. Check cable or battery.
2. Try a different USB port.
3. Restart computer.
4. Update drivers.

### Escalation
- Device not detected in Device Manager.

articles.title: How to Join a Microsoft Teams Meeting
articles.content:
## Steps
1. Click the meeting link.
2. Choose 'Open in Teams'.
3. Allow microphone and camera access.
4. Click 'Join Now'.

### Troubleshooting
- Ensure internet connection is stable.
- Restart Teams if audio fails.

articles.title: Phishing Email Reporting Procedure
articles.content:
## Overview

Report suspicious emails immediately.

### Steps
1. Do not click links.
2. Use the 'Report Phishing' button.
3. Forward email to security team.
4. Delete email after reporting.

### Indicators
- Urgent language.
- Suspicious attachments.
- Unknown sender domain.

articles.title: Monitor Not Displaying Image
articles.content:
## Troubleshooting
1. Ensure monitor is powered on.
2. Check HDMI/DisplayPort cable.
3. Test with another cable.
4. Restart computer.
5. Try different input source.

### Escalation
- No signal after testing with another device.

articles.title: How to Update Windows Operating System
articles.content:
## Steps
1. Open Settings.
2. Click 'Update & Security'.
3. Select 'Check for Updates'.
4. Install available updates.
5. Restart if prompted.

### Notes
- Keep device plugged in during update.
- Schedule updates outside work hours if possible.
